name: yaml_parse
description: Parse, validate, and convert YAML data.
description_for_agent: Parse YAML text or files. Convert between YAML and JSON. Parameters: text (string, optional — YAML text to parse), file_path (string, optional — path to YAML file), operation (string, optional — 'parse', 'validate', 'to_json'; default 'parse'). Returns parsed data as JSON.
